violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. FMC expired, must re-instate. Once food safety certificate is obtained, PIC to apply. Application provided during time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

Coving behind reach-in freezers was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
